subcodes.first_line: O thou my companion! It appeareth that thou hast become a prisoner in the city of Haifa, for when travel is postponed
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مونس من از قرار معلوم در مدینه حیفا مسجون گشته اید زیرا از برای مسافر
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation
